overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character in wizard robes exploring a gothic castle corridor adorned with house banners, then opening large wooden doors to enter a vast, sunlit dining hall with floating candles and stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with house banners

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the stone corridor, observing the Hogwarts crest and house banners on the walls

entered.detail: large wall hanging with H crest and Hogwarts motto
red and gold house banner with lion emblem
yellow and black house banner with badger emblem
high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaults
full plate armor standing on pedestal against the wall
full plate armor standing on pedestal against the wall
blue and silver house banner with eagle emblem
green and silver checkered house banner with serpent emblem
large carved wooden double doors with iron fixtures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow gothic corridor with high vaulted stone ceilings. House banners for Gryffindor, Hufflepuff, Ravenclaw, and Slytherin hang on the stone walls alongside suits of armor, while a large Hogwarts crest tapestry dominates the far wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor approach to Great Hall entrance

events.description: character opens the large wooden door revealing bright light from the hall beyond

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden door and pushing it open to enter the Great Hall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the large carved wooden doors at the end of the corridor, passing the last suits of armor. The door grows to fill the frame as the character reaches for the handle, opening it to reveal a bright, vast space beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and long tables

events.description: transition from narrow dark corridor to vast bright Great Hall
bright natural light streams through large stained glass windows illuminating the hall

agents.ego_description: walking down the central aisle between long dining tables filled with students

notable_agents.action: students seated at long wooden dining tables eating and conversing
students seated at long wooden dining tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: vast gothic hall with high ceilings and massive stone columns
hundreds of candles suspended in mid-air providing warm ambient light
large ornate stained glass windows depicting colorful heraldic scenes
long wooden house tables lined with benches and seated students
vertical house banners hanging between the tall windows

segments.scene_description: The character enters the magnificent Great Hall, a vast open space with sunlight streaming through enormous stained glass windows at the far end. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the hall above long dining tables filled with students, while the character walks down the central marble aisle toward the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed gothic corridor into the expansive brilliance of a sunlit dining hall. It begins by tracking a character through a narrow stone hallway where house banners and suits of armor line the vaulted walls, leading toward a large crest tapestry. As the character approaches the end of the passage, the camera closes in on a set of massive carved wooden doors that gradually fill the frame before swinging open to reveal a burst of light. The scene then expands into the magnificent Great Hall, shifting from the confined stone walls to a vast open space filled with floating candles and long dining tables. Finally, the camera glides down a central marble aisle toward enormous stained glass windows that flood the entire hall with streaming sunlight.
